'''Orma''' was a junk [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aramand Cluster]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Junkers had covered the world in scrapyards which contained many cultural artifacts including some toys and tech. Further within the planet were items of amazing value. Around the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], an individual was sent to look for the valuable artifacts, discovering a relic from the height of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].<ref name="The Detritus of History" /> Several hundred years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Orma (akia)|Orma]] [[akia]] colonized the planet.<ref name="FBS" />
